phrases.text_local: Onde encontro as caixas para levar a comida?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee en-KON-troo ahsh KAI-shahsh PA-rah le-VAH-rah ko-MEE-dah [liaison: levar a -> le-VAH-rah]
phrases.cultural_note: Takeaway packaging is typically self-served near exits to speed up service during peak hours.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, perto da saída principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, near the main exit.

responses.english: Good morning, near the main exit.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, perto da saída principal.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a estação de caixas para levar?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-jee FEE-kah ah ehs-tah-SOWN deh KYE-shahs PAH-rah leh-VAHR

likely_response.local: A estação de caixas para levar fica perto da saída.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH shtuh-SOWN DIH KEYE-shuhsh PUH-ruh lih-VAHR FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: The takeaway box station is near the exit.

responses.english: The takeaway box station is near the exit.
responses.phonetic: AH shtuh-SOWN DIH KEYE-shuhsh PUH-ruh lih-VAHR FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
responses.local: A estação de caixas para levar fica perto da saída.

likely_response.translation_en: You can pay at the cashier.

responses.english: You can pay at the cashier.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso deixar uma gorjeta voluntária?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee POH-soo dee-SHAHR OO-mah gor-ZHEH-tah vo-lun-TAH-ree-ah
phrases.cultural_note: Tipping is optional in Portugal; small change is commonly left in jars near service stations.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto à máquina de café.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH MAH-kee-nuh DIH kuh-FEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, beside the coffee machine.

responses.english: Good morning, beside the coffee machine.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH MAH-kee-nuh DIH kuh-FEH.
responses.local: Bom dia, junto à máquina de café.

phrases.text_local: Onde estão as caixas de takeaway?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH KEYE-shuhsh DIH tuh-keeuh-WEYE?
phrases.cultural_note: Takeaway boxes are placed near the exit for convenience.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, estão perto da saída.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ihsh-TOWN PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, they are near the exit.

responses.english: Good morning, they are near the exit.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ihsh-TOWN PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
responses.local: Bom dia, estão perto da saída.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which side for card payment
phrases.text_local: Em qual lado do balcão uso o cartão?
phrases.pronunciation: AYNG KWAHL LAH-doo DOO bahl-KOWN OO-zoo AW kuh-ruh-TOWN?
phrases.cultural_note: Card payments are processed at the counter before ordering, a standard practice in traditional Portuguese pastry shops.

likely_response.local: À direita da caixa, por favor.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH dee-RAY-tuh DUH KEYE-shuh, POOR fuh-VOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the card terminal is to the right of the register.

responses.english: Good morning, the card terminal is to the right of the register.
responses.phonetic: AH dee-RAY-tuh DUH KEYE-shuh, POOR fuh-VOHR.
responses.local: À direita da caixa, por favor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up receipt
phrases.text_local: Onde posso levantar o recibo da compra?
phrases.cultural_note: In traditional Portuguese bakeries, receipts are often placed in designated baskets near the pastry displays for customer convenience.
